title: Trump's Gaza committee remains an empty shell paralyzed by Israel
subhead: Created four months ago as part of Donald Trump's peace plan, the entity is supposed to manage the coastal territory in place of Hamas. But Israel is preventing its members from entering, leaving them stranded in their offices in Cairo.

title: US military conducts new strikes in southern Iran
Norway to join France-led nuclear deterrence program
Morocco faces over 40,000 job losses after France bans telemarketing calls
subhead: A law passed in France bans all prospecting calls without the customer's explicit consent starting August 11. The move endangers tens of thousands of employees in Moroccan call centers, which are heavily dependent on the French market.

title: How France's early heatwave is affecting plants and wildlife
subhead: Birds that nest under rooftops, such as swifts and swallows, are particularly at risk during heatwaves. This unprecedented spell is taking place right in the middle of the nesting season, but it is not accompanied by drought conditions.

title: Second seed Rybakina dumped out of French Open by Starodubtseva
subhead: It is Australian Open champion Elena Rybakina's earliest exit from any WTA tournament since the 2025 Miami Open.

title: At Versailles, Louis XVI's private chamber is recreated after 40 years of twists and turns
subhead: Reconstructed from a single fabric sample and written archives, the recreation of the room and bed where the king slept alone went through its share of extraordinary episodes before finally coming to fruition.

From a kidnapping in France to crypto wallet in Venezuela: Inside a ransom laundering scheme
subhead: An investigation into the kidnapping of a cryptocurrency entrepreneur's father has uncovered an unexpected criminal network, highlighting the complexity of the financial channels criminals use to launder money.

title: Documentary follows Greta Thunberg and Swedish climate activists' hope and despair
subhead: For seven years, filmmaker Helena Molin followed a dozen teenagers who helped found the Fridays for Future movement in 2018. The resulting documentary has been met with critical acclaim.

title: The network of US pilots helping women seek abortion care
subhead: Responding to increasingly strict anti-abortion laws in Texas, a non-profit organization offers free flights to neighboring states. The group also assists individuals seeking gender-affirming care.
